ValidationRule.description: Verifies required fields are populated when Stage is Down Select for PACS service line.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: RecordType.Name = "Post Acute Care Services Opportunity"&& ISPICKVAL(StageName, "Down Select") && (TEXT(Bid_Process__c) = ""|| ISNULL(Proposal_Date__c)|| ISNULL(Margin__c)|| ISNULL(Volume__c))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: These fields are required: RFP Process, Proposal Date, Total Margin, and Annual Encounters.
